criteria.name: Analytical thinking
criteria.description: Identify the client problem and goals, synthesize relevant information, and analyze the case with sufficient scope, depth, and stakeholder awareness.

criteria.name: Conceptual thinking
criteria.description: Use a relevant and clearly structured model, justify realistic assumptions, produce a complete and feasible strategy, and demonstrate useful creativity.

criteria.name: Quantitative thinking
criteria.description: Use correct, transparent, and decision-relevant calculations, projections, sensitivities, and financial or operational analysis.

criteria.name: Written and visual communication
criteria.description: Present a clear, persuasive, professional, and visually legible slide narrative that supports the recommendation. Score only what is visible in the submitted deck.
